productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Laosand Pink Flip Flops
description: Bright pink and blue make a great colour combination on these sporty flipflops from adidas. Comfortable and practical for everyday wear, you'll look great wearing these with any casual outfit &ndash coordinate by wearing matching pink plastic jewellery. Upper Woven fabric straps with cord detail for a unique look Toe separator to hold the foot in place Midsole Foam footbed with graphics and brand mark for all-day cushioned comfort and style Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for durability and traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
